title: Monday.com implementation and training
excerpt:
Hello, I’m a marketing consultant working with a small company in need of implementation and training services. We’re looking for a US based person or company. 
Thanks 
Shane

posts.author: sbrentham (Shane)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sbrentham

Welcome to the monday.com community! CarbonWeb has been partnering with companies to solve their workflow automation problems one component at a time. I would be interested to learn more about this company’s goals as it relates to their workflow and also see how we can help.

If you’d like to schedule a call to go over this further please select a time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

11997×2917 857 KB

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sbrentham Welcome to the community! there are lots of great partners here to help you out on your monday.com journey.

I’m based in San Diego, Ca and I’d love to sit down and chat with you about your specific needs and see if we are a good fit to work together. I’ve helped many companies with building monday.com workflows and refining/training the team on using monday.com best practices!

If you’re interested in talking more you can schedule a free call with me here: Calendly - Tim Little

Best!

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Shane, I know I’m a little late jumping in here, but if you are still looking for partner, we are here. to help! You can email us at monday@iointegration.com or visit our monday.com page: https://www.iointegration.com/io/monday-partner-services
We hope to hear from you!
Thank you.
Jenna

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sbrentham - Have you found the perfect monday partner to help you realize your vision for doing more with monday․com? If not, let’s chat and see if Polished Geek can help.

We offer a limited number of no-charge strategy sessions in the community each week. You can book one here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com
